sample_selection: hispand == 100 and bpl == 200 to focus on ethnically Mexican, Mexican-born respondents
citizen == 3 and 1900 <= yrimmig <= 2007 so the sample is noncitizen and arrived by the DACA residency cutoff
age between 17 and 40 to capture cohorts that could plausibly be eligible or just missed eligibility
treatment_definition: treatment = ((age - (year - yrimmig) <= 15) & (birthyr >= 1982)) so the person arrived before age 16 and was under 31 in 2012
